dashboard.title: Operational Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time planning progress and execution health for
dashboard.errorLoading: Error fetching metrics or project does not exist.
dashboard.noProjectSelectedDesc: Select an active project from the project switcher in the navbar to view its dashboard.
dashboard.noVolunteer: No separate volunteer activities registered for this project.
dashboard.noCenters: No participating centers assigned to this project settings.
dashboard.noSessionsDesc: This project container currently has {count} activities but zero scheduled sessions.
dashboard.navigateActivities: Navigate to the Activities tab to assign center participation and generate your deterministic session scheduling grid.
dashboard.noProjectsPmDesc: Get started by creating your first top-level planning and operational container.
dashboard.noProjectsViewerDesc: No projects have been set up in the database. Ask your project manager to create one.
dashboard.allArchivedDesc: All planning containers are currently in read-only archive status. You can switch to an archived project using the project switcher in the navbar to view history, or create a new active project.

projects.createDescription: Establish a new top-level operational planning container for scheduling activities and physical centers.
projects.editDescription: Update description, names, or target schedule range for this project.
projects.archiveDescription: Are you sure you want to archive {name}? Archiving makes this project read-only. Historical planning, centers, and activity progress remain fully accessible in reports, but no further mutations or scheduling additions will be permitted.
projects.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain scope, goals, or target demographic...
projects.dateError: Start date must be before end date

activities.title: Activities Planning
activities.subtitle: Define workshop tracks, event series, and campaign planning parameters for
activities.selectProjectDesc: Select an active planning container from the switcher in the navbar to manage its activities.
activities.noCentersDesc: Activities are operational sessions distributed across centers. You must assign at least one center to this project in settings before you can plan activities.
activities.archivedDesc: Archived activities will appear here when soft-deleted.
activities.noActivitiesDesc: Establish work parameters and scheduled counts to get started.
activities.planActivityDesc: Define operational parameters, date filters, and active branch participation inside
activities.editActivityDesc: Modify operational scope, dates, and active branch assignments.
activities.descriptionPlaceholder: Summarize planning targets, materials, or agendas...
activities.participatingCentersDesc: Select which assigned project branches will run sessions for this activity.
activities.archiveActivityDesc: Are you sure you want to archive {title}? Archiving an activity soft-deletes it. Scheduled execution sessions related to this activity will remain in the database but the activity will be filtered out of active lists.
activities.generateDesc: This will automatically distribute {count} planned sessions across the {centers} participating centers. The scheduling engine uses a fully deterministic round-robin distribution to map dates and centers. Generated sessions will be created as PENDING and NOT_SUBMITTED.
activities.imbalancedDesc: {count} sessions cannot be divided perfectly equally across {centers} participating centers. Some centers will be assigned 1 extra session to cover the total planned scope.
activities.permanentNote: Note: This action is permanent and cannot be undone or re-run once sessions are generated.
activities.sessionCountError: Planned session count must be greater than 0
activities.centersRequired: At least one participating center must be selected

sessions.selectProjectDesc: Select an active planning container from the switcher in the navbar to manage its sessions.
sessions.title: Sessions Registry
sessions.subtitle: Schedule, manage, and execute activity sessions for
sessions.consecutiveWarning: ⚠️ This center has a session on a consecutive or very close day.
sessions.noMatchesDesc: Refine your filters or search query to find sessions.
sessions.noSessionsDesc: Plan and generate sessions under the Activities tab to see them displayed here.
sessions.adjustSessionScheduleDesc: Manually adjust execution date, reassign branch centers, and lock this session to prevent future auto-modifications.
sessions.onlyCentersListed: Only centers participating in this activity are listed.
sessions.lockSessionCheckbox: 🔒 Lock session schedule (preserves date during future regeneration)
sessions.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a brief explanation for auditing scheduling overrides...

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Operational Gantt view for
timeline.noDataDesc: Generate sessions for your project activities to visualize them on the timeline.
timeline.noProjectDesc: Select a project to view its timeline.
timeline.mobileNote: Simplified list view on mobile. Use a larger screen for the full Gantt chart.
timeline.missingDocWarning: Documentation is missing for this completed session! Evidence must be uploaded to drive.

centers.title: Centers Management
centers.subtitle: Establish cities, operational branches, and manage manager assignments.
centers.searchPlaceholder: Search centers by name or city...
centers.noCentersDesc: Register the geographic and operational branches for your projects.
centers.createCenterDesc: Register a new operational center. City and Name are required fields.
centers.editCenterDesc: Modify details for the selected branch.
centers.archiveCenterDesc: Are you sure you want to archive {name}? Archived centers will remain visible historically, but cannot receive any new project assignments.
centers.fieldsRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

approvals.title: Session Approvals Workflow
approvals.subtitle: Manage operational execution audits and quality controls for
approvals.noQueueDesc: All physically executed sessions have been successfully reviewed, or no executions match current search criteria.
approvals.noProjectDesc: Select a project from the top bar navigation to manage reviews.
approvals.accessDeniedDesc: Only Project Managers are authorized to view and review session approval queues. Center managers can submit execution data within their respective branch workspaces.
approvals.reviewDesc: Audit documentation, verify execution quality, and submit your final approval decision.
approvals.notesRequired: Notes are required when rejecting session submissions.
approvals.validationRejectionNotesRequired: Validation failed: Rejection notes are required to reject this session.
approvals.sessionRejectedSuccess: Session rejected. Rejection notes logged and notified.
approvals.readOnlyFrozen: Read-Only: The parent project container is archived and locked. Review decisions are frozen.
approvals.driveLinkRequiredDesc: No active documentation URL was supplied. Sessions require folder proof to officially count.

reports.title: Operational Reports
reports.subtitle: Actionable insights and performance analytics for
reports.noReportData: No report data available for the selected filters
reports.noProjectDesc: Select a project to view its reports.
reports.accessDeniedDesc: Only Project Managers and Viewers can access operational reports.

notifications.title: Notifications Center
notifications.subtitle: Monitor schedules, manage team alerts, and view manual broadcasts.
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: There are no alerts matching your selected filters.
notifications.broadcastDesc: Broadcast a manual announcement to managers. Leave targeting empty for a project-wide broadcast.
notifications.noActiveProjectDesc: Select an active project from the top navigation bar to access the notifications feed.
notifications.noCentersAssigned: No centers assigned to this project yet.
notifications.errorMarkingAll: Failed to mark all as read

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage active project configuration, center assignments, and application preferences.
settings.noAssignmentsDesc: This project operates through participating branches. Link one now.
settings.customize: Customize language, themes, and notification profiles.
settings.participatingCentersDesc: Configure the operational centers assigned to this planning container.
settings.assignCenterDesc: Assign an active operational center to participate in
settings.noAvailableCenters: No additional active centers available for assignment.
settings.removeCenterDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {center} from {project}? This action removes the operational center association. All scheduling and activities bound to this project inside this center will need to be reassessed.
settings.archivedReadOnly: This project is archived and read-only. Unarchive it to enable editing.
settings.viewerOnly: Only project managers can modify project metadata.
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive operational alerts, delays, and approvals alerts.
settings.noProjectDesc: Select an active project from the project switcher in the navbar to configure its settings.
settings.errorDatesInvalid: Start date must be before end date

validation.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be before end date
validation.missingDriveLink: Documentation URL is required to complete session execution
validation.dateOutOfRange: Scheduled date must fall within project/activity duration parameters
validation.rejectionNotesRequired: Rejection notes are required to deny approval

archiveBanner.readOnlyMessage: The project container {name} is in read-only archive mode. No operational changes can be made.

auth.authDescription: Plan, schedule, and track field operations across multiple centers. Manage activities, sessions, approvals, and reporting — all in one place.

ai.title: AI Copilot Assistant
ai.subtitle: Operational insights for
ai.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
ai.emptyDesc: Ask operational questions about your project metrics, timeline schedules, approval queues, or center performances.
ai.errorGeneric: Failed to generate AI response. Please check your network or try again.
ai.placeholder: Ask about delays, progress, or center metrics...
ai.noProjectPlaceholder: Please select a project to enable AI...
ai.disclaimer: AI answers are generated based on active database snapshots. Always verify execution schedules manually.

progress: Show forecasted ETA based on current speed.
delay: Which center branches have the highest delays?
approvals: Check the pending manager review queue.
What are the common rejection trends?
What is our average approval turnaround time?
centers: Are there any underperforming center branches?
timeline: What are the risky future workloads?
Is there an execution load imbalance?
